name: Cloudweb, Inc.
summary: Cloudweb, Inc. provides web hosting and data storage services. It primarily focuses on developing and marketing its Hostwizer.com, W8hosting.com, and JeyCloud.com platforms. The company was formerly known as Data Backup Solutions Inc. and changed its name to Cloudweb, Inc. in October 2017. Cloudweb, Inc. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Mountain View, Florida.
